reviews.review_title: I don't know how but your game got worse
reviews.review_description: When I bought it a few years ago, you promised new games and updates. It's laggy doesn't track the controllers correctly. So thank you for letting the people that bought your game down. I really appreciate it! Not

reviews.review_title: JUST LIKE YOU THINK IT IS BUT BETTER !!
reviews.review_description:
THIS IS A GREAT LITTLE JEM AT A GREAT LITTLE PRICE !
 I HAD SOOO MUCH FUN WITH THIS !
 EASY TO LEARN HOW TO PLAY , VERY INTUITIVE . IF YOU EVER WENT TO A CARNIVAL OR CHUCKY CHEESE AND ENJOYED THAT THEN YOU’LL LOVE THIS !!

developer_response.body: Thanks much! I am looking at improving the games and also adding a few more minigames as well. Take care.
